scope: Artifact-only resolution plan for global baseline blockers preventing IF09-FIND-001 S3 remediation apply acceptance.

blockers.name: active-context validator local failure: project post-sync decision must be pass

recommended_resolution_sequence: 1. Preserve artifact-only governance flow by keeping README.md local dirty diff out of scope and out of commits until a separate workspace hygiene decision is made.
2. Open an artifact-only triage for blocker B5 to determine whether the local validator failure is caused by stale active-context expectations, missing pass lineage, or a validator contract mismatch.

3. If B5 triage proves the validator issue can be resolved by active-context artifact or validator-scope work alone, request separate authorization for that isolated active-context fix before touching Project_ARIS.

4. After B5 is understood, prepare a separate artifact-only plan for B1 and B3 covering Project_ARIS global baseline repair and focused test expectation drift, because both imply code or test changes outside the authorized surface of this gate.

5. Investigate B2 separately with a bounded diagnostic gate to determine whether the CURRENT_STATE.md fatal path error comes from workspace git/index mismatch, temporary test harness checkout assumptions, or another path-coupling mechanism.
6. Only after B1, B2, B3, and B5 each have an approved and completed resolution path, request a fresh authorization packet for any future local remediation apply retry on IF09-FIND-001/S3.
future_authorizations_required: Explicit authorization for any active-context validator or artifact-scope repair if B5 triage identifies a bounded fix surface.
Explicit authorization for any Project_ARIS code or test change addressing B1 global baseline failures.
Explicit authorization for any Project_ARIS code or test change addressing B3 focused test roadmap or phase expectation drift.
Explicit authorization for any diagnostic or corrective action that changes git-tracked CURRENT_STATE.md behavior, path assumptions, or workspace checkout logic for B2.
A new explicit operator command before any retry of local remediation apply for IF09-FIND-001/S3.
retry_local_remediation_apply_prerequisi: B5 validator blocker is triaged and either resolved canonically or converted into a known non-blocking condition with explicit operator direction.
B1 Project_ARIS global baseline failures are addressed in a separately authorized scope and the relevant baseline becomes green enough to stop invalidating remediation acceptance.
B2 CURRENT_STATE.md path failure has a confirmed root cause and a separately authorized resolution path if correction is needed.
B3 focused test roadmap or phase expectation drift is corrected in a separately authorized Project_ARIS scope.
The local README.md dirty diff in active-context remains excluded from unrelated commits or is handled by an explicit workspace hygiene decision.
A fresh remediation-apply authorization packet is issued after the blocker resolution evidence is complete.
